articles.author: Josephine Walker
articles.title: Trump's America faces global side-eye - Axios
articles.description: Global views of U.S. reliability have fallen sharply under Trump.
articles.content:
By the numbers: Seventy-six percent of people in 36 countries have no confidence in Trump, while 23% trust his leadership, according to the survey released Tuesday.
